user.title: Connect to Control4
user.description: Enter your Control4 account credentials and the **local IP address** of your controller (e.g. `192.168.1.25`). The controller IP can be found in Composer Pro or the Control4 app under Settings → Controller.

data_description.username: The email address you use to log into the Control4 app.
data_description.host: Local IP address of your Control4 controller — NOT the cloud address.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Control4 Director. Verify the IP address and that the controller is reachable on your network.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Double-check your Control4 account email and password.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Control4 controller is already configured.

data_description.include_hidden_rooms: When enabled, rooms that are hidden in the Control4 Navigator UI will still appear as entities in Home Assistant.
